name: @radzor/two-factor-auth
description: TOTP-based two-factor authentication. Generate secrets, create QR URIs, and verify tokens (RFC 6238).

inputs.name: issuer
inputs.description: App or service name shown in authenticator apps.

outputs.name: verificationResult
outputs.description: Verification result with validity flag and time step delta.

events.name: onVerified
events.description: Fired when a TOTP token is verified.

actions.name: generateSecret
actions.description: Generate a new TOTP secret. Returns raw bytes and base32-encoded form.

actions.name: generateQrUri

params.name: accountName
params.description: User account name shown in the authenticator app.

actions.description: Generate an otpauth:// URI suitable for QR code display.

actions.name: verifyToken
actions.description: Verify a TOTP token. Checks current and adjacent time windows.

llm.constraints: No external dependencies. TOTP tokens are time-based (RFC 6238) — server clock must be accurate. Default window is ±1 period (30 seconds). QR URIs use otpauth:// format.
